body.description: How this component is rendered. Omit for primitives rendered by the host.

view.description: What data this component views and which prop receives it

imports.description: Ordered list of DIDs (import stack). For each NSID, the first DID that has a component with that rkey wins.

updatedAt.description: Last update timestamp. Set by the publish flow to bust cached responses.

main.description: Component record. The rkey is the type NSID this component implements.

prop.description: Which component prop receives the view data.

view.description: Declares what data this component views and which prop receives it.

rkey.description: The record key, baked from the collection's lexicon at authoring time. Presence enables DID expansion and identity page routing.

collection.description: The collection this component views. Omit for any-collection.

viewRecord.description: View accepts individual records of a collection. Omit collection for a generic record view. When rkey is present, the component accepts bare DIDs (expanded to full AT URIs) and appears on identity pages.

did.description: DID of the service hosting this component

personalized.description: When true, host sends a signed JWT identifying the viewer with each call.

bodyExternal.description: Component rendered by calling a remote XRPC endpoint

bodyTemplate.description: Component rendered by the host from a serialized element tree

format.description: String format constraint. Only applies when type is 'string'.

viewPrimitive.description: View accepts a primitive value type.
